title: Some of the items on the Letterform Archive have lots of images (one foundry book has 777), here's a secret option for viewing. In the item view hold down 'option/alt' and click on the space between the thumbnails (beneath the main image) to see all the thumbnails as a vertical grid. Repeat, to toggle back to the strip view. Also left right arrow keys will step through the images. Try it https:// oa.letterformarchive.org/item? workID=lfa_emigre_0029 # letterformArchive # graphicDesign # typography

author: Letterform Archive

title: Werner Stitz, Fotomagic Modifikationen, Optelma Grafica, 1971. This comb-bound book is one of our favorites, documenting the rise of experimental phototypesetting. In this example, a Basel-based company distorts type and artwork using their FOTOMAGIC overlay optical units. See it up close in the Online Archive: https:// oa.letterformarchive.org/item? workID=lfa_type_0953 # LetterformArchive # Phototype # 1970sDesign # PsychedelicArt # ExperimentalTypography # DavidaTypeface # Typography
author: Letterform Archive
